arts.ttl: Barcelona, PSG Poised to Challenge Juventus for Arsenal Standout Nearing Free Agency
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have quality talent in their midfield, but one area they lack at this position is height. Fabian Ruiz is the tallest player at 6′ 2″ (1.89m), but behind him, it’s pretty thin regarding players near the Spaniard’s stature. Senny Mayulu is 6′ 0″ (1.83m), but there’s not much behind the 18-year-old.
